records.description: RMIT's private generative AI chatbot for student study support, powered by OpenAI models.
records.howToObtain: Launch Val and sign in with an RMIT email and password.

evidence.sourceTitle: Val GenAI Chatbot - Your virtual learning assistant - RMIT University
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Val is RMIT's generative artificial intelligence tool - powered by OpenAI's GPT-4.1, GPT-4o and o3-mini models. Val is private, secure and free for RMIT students to use.

evidence.sourceTitle: Five ways to get the most out of Val, RMIT's AI chatbot - RMIT University
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Val is RMIT's official generative AI chatbot. It's powered by GPT-4o, but it's confidential, secure and free for RMIT students.

records.description: SKKU's official ChatGPT information site provides access instructions, student use cases, instructor use cases, and misuse guidance.
records.howToObtain: Use SKKU's ChatGPT Total Information guidance pages for access and use instructions.
records.costToUser: Not specified by the public source.

evidence.sourceTitle: Sungkyunkwan University (SKKU) ChatGPT Total Information
evidence.evidenceSnippet: The SKKU ChatGPT Total Information site includes Introducing ChatGPT, How to Use ChatGPT, ChatGPT as a Tool, Student Use Cases, Instructor Use Cases, and misuse guidance.

evidence.sourceTitle: Sungkyunkwan University (SKKU) ChatGPT Total Information | Student Use Cases
evidence.evidenceSnippet: SKKU student guidance lists possible ChatGPT uses including asking questions, writing feedback, research support, idea generation, language learning, programming help, and illustration keyword generation.

records.description: Microsoft Copilot Chat is presented by Sapienza as a generative AI solution integrated into the university's Microsoft 365 platform.
records.howToObtain: Use Sapienza's Microsoft 365 environment; the source also linked training/webinar course pages.
records.costToUser: Not specified by the public source.

evidence.sourceTitle: Scopri Copilot Chat - Sapienza Università di Roma
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Copilot Chat è la nuova soluzione basata su modelli di intelligenza artificiale generativa, ora integrata nella piattaforma Microsoft 365 della nostra università.

evidence.sourceTitle: Formazione studenti sull'utilizzo di Copilot Chat di Microsoft - Sapienza TLC-S
evidence.evidenceSnippet: The Sapienza TLC-S page describes Copilot Chat as a new generative AI solution integrated into Microsoft 365 and provides a student training course link.

records.description: Aarhus University staff guide for the basic enterprise version of Microsoft Copilot.
records.howToObtain: Open copilot.microsoft.com and sign in with an AU ID.
records.costToUser: Not specified by the public source.

evidence.sourceTitle: Guide to using Microsoft Copilot - Aarhus University Staff Service
evidence.evidenceSnippet: All AU employees have access to the basic enterprise version of Microsoft Copilot via their AU login.

evidence.sourceTitle: Guide to using Microsoft Copilot - Aarhus University Staff Service
evidence.evidenceSnippet: How to find and sign in to Copilot: Open your browser and type 'copilot.microsoft.com'. Sign in using your AU ID.

records.description: Aarhus University states that access to the extended Copilot 365 version is not an option for IT security and data protection reasons.
records.howToObtain: Not available according to the public staff guide.

evidence.sourceTitle: Guide to using Microsoft Copilot - Aarhus University Staff Service
evidence.evidenceSnippet: For IT security reasons, access to the extended version of Copilot 365 is not an option. This is due to data protection considerations and the potential access to sensitive data.

records.description: University of Bath guidance identifies Microsoft Copilot as the university-provided GenAI tool for work use.
records.howToObtain: Log into a Bath account and use copilot.microsoft.com, copilot.cloud.microsoft, or m65.cloud.microsoft/chat.
records.costToUser: Not specified by the public source.

evidence.sourceTitle: Introduction to Microsoft Copilot - University of Bath Learning and Teaching Hub
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Copilot is the only Generative AI tool available to all University staff when logged into a device with a Bath login.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI - what is it? - University of Bath Learning and Teaching Hub
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Microsoft Copilot is built into Microsoft Office and can be accessed directly at m65.cloud.microsoft/chat. It is the only GenAI tool provided by the University of Bath for work use and is made available to all staff and students.
